mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM clinic_inventory_check WHERE deleted = 0
AND (check_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR maker LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR check_status LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
SELECT id, check_no, check_date, maker, check_status, remark, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM clinic_inventory_check WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clinic_inventory_check (check_no, check_date, maker, check_status, remark, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{checkNo}, #{checkDate}, #{maker}, #{checkStatus}, #{remark}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deleted})
mapper.update:
UPDATE clinic_inventory_check
check_no = #{checkNo}, check_date = #{checkDate}, maker = #{maker}, check_status = #{checkStatus}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, deleted = #{deleted},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
